headline: Verizon Sponsorship Cuts Put Brand Strength And Network Investment In Focus
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) is reviewing its sponsorship spending as part of a major cost-cutting effort under its new CEO. The review could lead to scaling back or exiting high-profile sports and music sponsorships, including its partnership with the NFL. The potential changes follow earlier layoffs and operational adjustments as the company looks to reshape its expense base. For you as an investor, this highlights how Verizon, a large US wireless and broadband provider, approaches...

headline: Why Verizon Stock Skyrocketed 20.4% Last Month and Is Rising in March
summary: Verizon has unexpectedly emerged as a hot stock in 2026.
